diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,124 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main entry point for Hono framework, exports Hono class that extends HonoBase with default Router (RegExpRouter)
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, HonoOptions, Env, Schema, BlankEnv, BlankSchema
+- Simple note: Core class for request routing and handler execution, uses smart router default
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Base class for Hono with router, composition, middleware, context handling, method decorators
+- Names noticed: HonoOptions, GetPath, Context, compose, MiddlewareHandler, ErrorHandler, NotFoundHandler, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, COMPOSED_HANDLER
+- Simple note: Foundation layer for request composition and context management, supports method decorators
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Barrel export for PatternRouter
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter
+- Simple note: Single export forwarding implementation
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Pattern-based routing using regular expressions for path matching, supports all HTTP methods
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Route, Params, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, endsWithWildcard, getPath, splitPath
+- Simple note: Maintains routes as patterns with regex matching, returns matched path, params, and handler
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Linear search router with star (*) pattern support, checks all routes sequentially
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, RegExpMatchArrayWithIndices, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter
+- Simple note: Checks routes in order, returns first match or nothing, does not modify routes or support fallback
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Barrel export for RegExpRouter
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter
+- Simple note: Single export forwarding implementation
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Factory/router for creating RegExpRouter instances with prepared router pattern compilation
+- Names notes: RegExpRouter, PreparedRouter, PatternRouter, getRouter, splitPath, prepare, getPattern, matchRoute, prepareMethod
+- Simple note: Compiles routes into regex patterns for fast matching during routing
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Matcher class for compiled regex patterns, matches request paths against patterns
+- Names noticed: Matcher, matchRoute, result, params, namedRegexes, regex, lastIndex, match, exec, slice, split, replace, escapePattern, escapeBackslash, escapeDollarSign, escapeParentheses, escapeSlash
+- Simple note: Uses regex exec to match path, extracts named capture groups as path params, supports dynamic segments
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: Prepared router with precompiled regex patterns stored in node structure
+- Names noticed: PreparedRouter, Node, preparedRouter, method, name, type, index, getRouter
+- Simple note: Stores compiled regex patterns per method per node for efficient route matching
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Node class representing internal trie node with prepared route and handler sets
+- Names noticed: Node, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, pattern, handler, methods, children, score, possibleKeys, processedSet, checkOptionalParameter, splitRoutingPath, getPattern, splitPath, split, slice, lastIndexOf, charCodeAt
+- Simple note: Tree structure with patterns, handlers, and score optimization for smart routing
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Trie tree structure for organizing routes alphabetically, used by smart router
+- Names noticed: Trie, TrieState, insert, find, pattern, patternIndex, score, type
+- Simple note: Alphabetical tree of paths with score-based routing decisions, supports optional parameters
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Barrel export for SmartRouter
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter
+- Simple note: Single export forwarding implementation
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Hybrid router that decides between TrieRouter and RegExpRouter based on route patterns
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, TrieRouter, RegExpRouter, MessageNames, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, routes, routers, addRoute, findBestRoute, router, build, find, score, insert
+- Simple note: Analyzes route score and pattern length to select TrieRouter or RegExpRouter dynamically
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Barrel export for TrieRouter
+- Names notices: TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Single export forwarding implementation
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Trie-based router for static paths only, builds alphabetical tree with pattern matching
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, UnsupportedPathError, Node, checkOptionalParameter, match, path, matchPath, matchNode, insert, find, routes, router, score, pathScore, insertStaticRoute, insertParamRoute
+- Simple note: Pure tree routing for static paths, no dynamic segments, returns deepest matched node
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Node class for trie tree with method-specific handler sets and possibleKeys for pattern resolution
+- Names noticed: Node, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, Params, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, PatternType, ROUTE_TYPE_STATIC, ROUTE_TYPE_PARAM, ROUTE_TYPE_WILDCARD, ROUTE_TYPE_REST, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, split, slice, indexOf, lastIndexOf, charCodeAt, toString, has, set, get, delete, map, match, handle, find, insert, insertRoute, getPatternForWildcard, getParams, getHandler, isParam, isWildcard, isRest, score
+- Simple note: Tree node with children, handlers by method, score for routing decision, possibleKeys for wildcard resolution
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Common test cases used across all router tests
+- Names noticed: describe, test, expect, it, beforeEach, afterAll, createRequest, assertRequest, assertResponse, assertPath, assertParams, assertMatch, assertNoMatch, assertAllMatch, assertAllNoMatch, ROUTES_VARIABLES, ROUTES_MIXED, ROUTES_MIXED_WITH_SLASHES, ROUTES_DYNAMIC, ROUTES_WILDCARD, ROUTES_REST, ROUTES_NESTED_DYNAMIC, ROUTES_OPTIONAL, ROUTES_NESTED_DYNAMIC_WITHOUT_PARENT, ROUTES_NESTED_DYNAMIC_WITH_PARENTHESIS
+- Simple note: Shared test data structures and helper functions for router testing
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for PatternRouter, tests regex matching, parameter extraction, and edge cases
+- Names noticed: describe, test, expect, PatternRouter, PatternRouterClass, it, beforeEach, add, route, path, method, handler, find, match, matchRoute, matchPath, params, handlerPath, paramsTest
+- Simple note: Tests pattern compilation, path splitting, matching, parameter extraction, and wildcard handling
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for LinearRouter, tests linear search behavior with star patterns
+- Names noticed: describe, test, expect, LinearRouter, LinearRouterClass, it, beforeEach, add, router, route, path, method, handler, find, match, params, test, LinearRouterTests, matchRoute, matchPath, LinearRouterTestCase
+- Simple note: Tests linear search, star wildcard matching, optional parameters, and precedence rules
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for RegExpRouter, tests regex pattern compilation and matching
+- Names noticed: describe, test, expect, RegExpRouter, RegExpRouterClass, it, beforeEach, RegExpRouterTests, add, router, route, path, method, handler, find, match, matchRoute, matchPath, params, prepare, PreparedRouter
+- Simple note: Tests pattern compilation into regex, regex matching, parameter extraction from capture groups
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for SmartRouter, tests hybrid routing strategy selection
+- Names noticed: describe, test, expect, SmartRouter, SmartRouterClass, it, beforeEach, SmartRouterTests, add, router, route, path, method, handler, find, match, message, router, insert, score, insert, insertStaticRoute, insertParamRoute, insertCatchAll, insertParamSegment, insert, deleteRoute
+- Simple note: Tests dynamic router selection based on score, trie vs regex choice, score calculation
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for TrieRouter, tests trie tree operations and matching
+- Names noticed: describe, test, expect, TrieRouter, TrieRouterClass, it, beforeEach, TrieRouterTests, add, router, route, path, method, handler, insert, find, match, matchRoute, matchPath
+- Simple note: Tests trie insert, find, match operations, static path matching, no wildcard support
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for Trie Node class, tests tree node operations
+- Names noticed: describe, test, expect, Node, NodeClass, it, NodeTests, insert, insertRoute, insertStaticRoute, insertParamRoute, insertCatchAll, insertParamSegment, map, match, getRoute, remove, delete, deleteRoute, deleteChild, getChildren, getHandler, setHandler, set, get, has, find, remove, isMatch, removeMatch, removeRoute, score, insert, remove, removeStaticRoute, removeParamRoute, removeCatchAll, removeParamSegment, removeSegment, remove, removeChild
+- Simple note: Tests node insert/delete/map/match methods with static, param, catch-all, and rest segments
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

The user wants me to create a documentation file for a benchmark task. I need to:

1. Create the bench-artifacts directory if it doesn't exist
2. Read all the specified files from the repository
3. Write a markdown file with a specific format

Let me start by checking if the bench-artifacts directory exists and then read all the required files.
